title: Consultation - Merchant Shipping (International Safety Management) Code Regulations
body: "This is a Consultation on a proposed new Merchant Shipping (International Safety Management (ISM) Code) to revoke the UK assimilated version of Regulation (EC) 336/2006 on the implementation of the International Safety Management Code within the Community and the Merchant Shipping (International Safety Management (ISM) Code) Regulations 2014 and replace these two instruments with a new set of Regulations requiring compliance with the International Safety Management Code. The new SI will be accompanied by a new Marine Guidance Note. "
